subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Thy latest letter was received in Alexandria. Despite extreme feebleness... during this journey I am occupied night and day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه اخیر در اسکندریه وصول یافت با وجود نهایت ضعف ... در این سفر شب و روز مشغولیت
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
